patch.value: Implement a deterministic prompt renderer and command for pm-brief so agents can get compact next-turn instructions without manually translating markdown brief output. This supports project management = context management by reducing token waste and improving handoff quality.
Add agent handoff prompt command to pm-brief
Add a production-ready pm brief prompt command that turns the existing structured brief into a copy-pasteable agent handoff prompt.
pm brief prompt exists; output is deterministic and token-aware; tests cover prompt rendering and command registration; README documents usage; release check passes.

value.author: unknown
value.text: Implemented pm brief prompt with deterministic copy-pasteable agent handoff output. Updated tests to cover command registration and prompt rendering, updated README usage, and ran npm run release:check successfully: 11 node:test tests passed, npm audit --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities, npm pack --dry-run succeeded, changelog check passed.

patch.value: Agent handoff prompt command and renderer added.
Agents can generate a compact copy-pasteable handoff prompt from pm state.
Command registered, prompt renderer tested, README documented, and npm run release:check passed.
Implemented pm brief prompt and verified it through tests and release checks.
